title: How Long Does It Take to Reset Your Metabolism After 40? A Realistic Timeline
author: Happy Aging Team
primary_keyword: how long to reset metabolism after 40
meta_title: How Long Does It Take to Reset Your Metabolism After 40?
meta_description: Wondering how long to reset metabolism after 40? This realistic week-by-week timeline explains what changes first, why metabolism slows, and how to accelerate the process.
